title: tinkers_ingenuity
description: Add new modifiers, tools, materials, to tconstruct.
body:
This is an additional mod for tconstruct.
New tools:

A razor with a larger attack range, wide blade sickle with larger wave reach, a battleaxe that can tear apart armor, Bowie's knife with faster speed, a hammer capable of flying targets.

Tool materials and modifiers:

**nirvana:** In the main hand, when the user is fatally injured, the tool will sacrifice itself, making the user immune to this injury and restoring 20 points of life.

**Fleet of feet:** When using this tool to crit, you will get a large speed increase.

**flight:** When you hold this tool, you gain the ability to fly.

**slaughter:** When the target's maximum health is lower than the user's, it will cause higher damage.

**Aftershock:** After hitting the target, this tool will cause additional magic damage equivalent to 25% attack damage multiplied by the modifier level.

**Knight splendor:** The tool will give the user a damage absorption value according to the damage caused, and at the same time, it will increase the damage caused according to the damage absorption value when attacking.

**Leverage:** After using this tool to attack, it will weaken the target to strengthen itself.

**Rebirth:** When the user's life is not full, the endurance of modifier level points is consumed every 5 seconds to restore the life of modifier level points for the user.

And more…

Most materials can be made in smelting furnaces, you may also discover items and materials during your adventure.
